name: rtime-automation
description: Read-only automation and reminder diagnostics for rtime assistant workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect reminder, scheduler, notification, and workflow automation health.
interface.longDescription: Rtime Automation provides read-only diagnostics and planning surfaces for reminders, systemd timers, Feishu notification wiring, workflow automation lanes, and automation run-log metadata without sending notifications or writing runtime state.
defaultPrompt: Plan this reminder workflow without sending anything.
